name: tech-doc
description: Generate technical documentation with guided requirements gathering

structured_questions.question: What system, feature, or component are you documenting?
structured_questions.placeholder: e.g., API Gateway, User Authentication Service, Payment Processing Module

structured_questions.question: Who is the primary audience for this document?
What level of detail do you need?
Does this integrate with existing systems?
What are the key technical constraints or requirements?
structured_questions.placeholder: e.g., Performance (<100ms latency), Security (SOC2 compliance), Scalability (10K req/s)

questions.question: What are the main components or modules in this system?
Describe the key data entities and their relationships
Describe the integration points: protocols, data formats, authentication
How will you meet these constraints? Specific approaches or technologies?
Describe the deployment environment and infrastructure
questions.placeholder: e.g., AWS ECS, Kubernetes, serverless, on-prem

questions.question: What technologies and frameworks are you using?

completeness_checks.message: Please specify the desired level of detail
